stemHtml: Call sign AIRFLY12345, cruising at FL350, passing BCN VOR, in contact with Barcelona Approach. You suffer a depressurisation. What is the correct distress call?

options.a: Mayday, mayday, mayday, Barcelona approach, AIRFLY12345, passing BCN VOR, descending FL100, depressurisation.
options.b: Barcelona Approach AIRFLY12345 depressurisation problem descending FL100, VOR passed, mayday.
options.c: Mayday, mayday, mayday, Barcelona approach, AIRFLY12345, depressurisation problem, descending FL100, overhead BCN, heading 180, 150 POB.
options.d: Mayday, mayday, mayday, Barcelona approach, AIRFLY12345, depressurisation problem, descending FL100, intend to land Barcelona.
